title: Error reported at the wrong line
body:
When running iverilog c74048a526a on this file 
```
module toto;
endmodule

module top;
        sub i(.o);
endmodule

module sub(output o);
endmodule
```
The error is reported at line 1 instead of 5:
```
test.v:1: error: Net o is not defined in this context.
test.v:1: error: Output port expression must support continuous assignment.
test.v:1:      : Port 1 (o) of sub is connected to o
```
code_blocks:
test.v:1: error: Net o is not defined in this context.
test.v:1: error: Output port expression must support continuous assignment.
test.v:1:      : Port 1 (o) of sub is connected to o
